operating_ranges.evidence: Coffee Boiler Dispensing: Set in ticks (controlled by flowmeter), Adjustment Range: 0 to 1000 ticks

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: accelerated when water filter exceeds life cycle
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The water filter has to be changed after its life time cycle. Otherwise the boilers will be damaged due to the limescale

fault_conditions.name: coffee_boiler_heating_warning
fault_conditions.description: Coffee boiler is heating but message remains displayed
fault_conditions.evidence: Coffee boiler is heating... If this message remains, contact service organisation

fault_conditions.name: coffee_boiler_temp_sensor_failure
fault_conditions.evidence: Coffee boiler temperature sensor failure. Please check the temperature sensor and cable

fault_conditions.name: coffee_boiler_heating_stop
fault_conditions.description: Coffee boiler heating to nominal temperature
fault_conditions.symptoms: machine waiting for boiler to reach temperature
fault_conditions.evidence: Coffee boiler is heating... Wait until the coffee boiler has reached its nominal temperature

maintenance_actions.name: water_filter_replacement
maintenance_actions.evidence: Please change the water filter. Predefined water amount has been reached

assumptions.statement: Ticks are approximately equal to milliliters for flow measurement
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Ticks are approximately equal to ml' for coffee boiler dispensing control

assumptions.statement: Coffee boiler operates separately from steam/water boiler for temperature control
assumptions.reason: Manual specifies 'Dedicated coffee boiler, separated from the water/steam boiler. Ensures productivity and temperature control'
